description: Offline versioned PubMed fixture set for SGLT2 inhibitors in T2DM + CKD. Records are manually curated from real published PubMed abstracts. They are NOT live API responses — do not claim these are real-time data.
query_context: SGLT2 inhibitors (empagliflozin, dapagliflozin, canagliflozin) in Type 2 Diabetes with Chronic Kidney Disease
notes: These fixtures represent real published studies but are manually curated summaries, not verbatim API responses.
PMID values correspond to real PubMed records as of the curated_at date.
Do not use these records as authoritative clinical evidence without verifying against the live PubMed API.
